short_summary: EU accession progress, Iran deal watch
rationale: EU accession talks continuing is a meaningful positive for Ukraine's future; the US-Iran deal momentum is watched carefully as it could shift US geopolitical attention and resources away from Ukraine.

top_events.title: EU formally launches accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: EU accession talks are officially underway for Ukraine — a significant long-term anchor for sovereignty and reconstruction, though no immediate war impact.

top_events.title: US-Iran peace deal within reach but not yet signed
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could redirect US diplomatic and military focus away from Ukraine's support, a concern for Kyiv even if the deal itself is positive for global stability.

top_events.title: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push
top_events.summary: Accelerating US-Iran diplomacy signals Washington's attention is partly elsewhere; Ukraine monitors any shift in US strategic priorities closely.
